ogTitle: Top Camp vs Torbanlea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Top Camp and Torbanlea.
heading: Top Camp vs Torbanlea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Top Camp, Queensland and Torbanlea, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Top Camp has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Torbanlea (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Top Camp or Torbanlea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Top Camp has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Torbanlea scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Top Camp scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Torbanlea scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Top Camp or Torbanlea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Top Camp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
